assistant_summary: {"verdict":"revise","summary":"The plan is documentation-focused and correctly keeps unsupported command-line inspection out of automated verification, but it leaves several implementation-defining choices unresolved and has at least one non-concrete target path. Revise before implementation so the executor has deterministic doc surfaces, decisions, and review output location.","findings":[{"severity":"major","issue":"The plan defers key scope decisions to implementation, including final documentation surface, whether docs/spec.md is refreshed or labeled historical, how to resolve docs/guidance-schema.md, and where the review outcome lives. These are not just review gaps; they materially change target files and work volume.","required_change":"Choose the documentation surfaces and concrete strategy in the plan before implementation. For example: update README.md, update or status-label docs/spec.md, either add docs/guidance-schema.md or amend AGENTS.md, and create a named review report path."},{"severity":"major","issue":"P4 uses a placeholder target file, \"docs/review or chosen documentation review surface\", which is not concrete enough for execution or later verification.","required_change":"Replace the placeholder with a specific file path, such as docs/documentation-review.md, or explicitly state that the review outcome will be incorporated into README.md and name the section."},{"severity":"minor","issue":"Manual verification repeatedly says to run optional lint/typecheck/test commands outside the deterministic verifier. This is allowed as manual evidence, but repeating it in every phase may confuse implementers into treating those commands as required phase gates for a docs-only change.","required_change":"Consolidate optional local validation into P5 or a single manual-evidence note, and keep phase manual checks focused on content inspection."}],"next_action":"revise_plan"}

{"verdict":"approved","summary":"The revised plan is documentation-only, has concrete target outputs, resolves the prior placeholder and deferred decisions, follows the repository documentation layering identified by research, and keeps unsupported inspection or uv commands out of automated_verification. Manual verification is appropriate for the docs-focused checks.","findings":[{"severity":"minor","issue":"P1's concrete target-set manual check omits docs/decisions_outcomes.md and docs/adr/README.md, which are later reviewed in P3. This is a small consistency issue, not a blocker.","required_change":null}],"next_action":"implement"}
